title: Campaign config
description: Config for one X/Threads bot (one business, one account)

imageEnabled.description: When true, generate and attach an AI image to posts (requires image-prompts.json in campaign dir)

imagePrompts.description: Path hint: scene prompts are loaded from campaigns/<slug>/image-prompts.json when imageEnabled is true

engageKeywords.description: Keywords for the engagement engine to search for relevant tweets in the target community

engageEnabled.description: When true, enable engagement automation (search, like, reply, follow) for this campaign. Requires X Basic tier.

personasFile.description: Path to personas definition file (relative to campaign directory). Default: personas.json
